title: Response Status, Success Variants, Failure Taxonomy, and Problem Details · Go Client Systems · Contract Triage
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for response status, success variants, failure taxonomy, and problem details, producing typed response and failure classifier. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http typed response and failure classifier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners…
objectives: Interpret informational, successful, redirection, client-error, and server-error status codes as protocol metadata. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Handle 201, 202, 204, 206, and other success responses with their location, body, and completion implications. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Separate request construction, transport, status, representation, and domain failures in a stable client contract. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
